title: subworkflow - github platform engineering publish postmortem draft
description: GitHub remediation/orchestration subworkflow for platform-engineering.\n\nThis workflow writes or updates an operational control document in GitHub and enforces non-fire-and-forget behavior using explicit wait and verification tasks.
guide:
## GitHub remediation/orchestration subworkflow for platform-engineering.

### 🎯 Purpose
- Publish postmortem draft template for rapid analysis.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🏢 **githubOwner**: GitHub organization or user
- 📦 **githubRepository**: Target repository
- 🌿 **githubBranch**: Target branch
- 🔌 **githubConnectionId**: Dynatrace GitHub connection
- 🗂️ **filePathOverride**: Optional custom path override
- 📝 **fileContentOverride**: Optional custom content override

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Execute Dynatrace GitHub connector action to write/update file
- ⏳ Wait for finalized connector result (SHA present)
- ✅ Verify commit/content SHA and fail if missing

### 🔐 Safety
- ❌ Never fire-and-forget
- ✅ Explicit wait and final verification tasks are mandatory

github_create_or_replace_file_1.name: github_create_or_replace_file_1

input.fileContent:
{{ input()["fileContentOverride"] if input()["fileContentOverride"] else "# Automation Evidence

- Context: platform-engineering
- Pattern: publish-postmortem-draft
- Purpose: Publish postmortem draft template for rapid analysis.
- Source: Dynatrace workflow automation
- Status: generated
" }}

github_create_or_replace_file_1.description: Create or update GitHub file for orchestration evidence.

wait-for-github-operation.name: wait-for-github-operation
wait-for-github-operation.description: Wait for GitHub operation to expose commit/content SHA.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final verification of GitHub operation success.
